svg.title: Production-Grade Microservices Platform on Azure
svg.desc: Lane diagram for Online Boutique on AKS — Terraform IaC, Helm charts, ArgoCD GitOps, Azure DevOps CI/CD, per-env ACR + Key Vault, NGINX + cert-manager TLS, Prometheus/Grafana observability.
svg.text: Terraform IaC · Helm charts · ArgoCD GitOps · Azure DevOps CI/CD · Azure AKS · Online Boutique
